title: 4Pcs Expanding File Folder A4: Poly Pockets Document Organiser 12 Compartment Large Capacity Paperwork Organiser with Labels Accordion File Organizer for Home Office and School Use
features: 𝐄𝐟𝐟𝐢𝐜𝐢𝐞𝐧𝐭 𝐅𝐢𝐥𝐞 𝐎𝐫𝐠𝐚𝐧𝐢𝐬𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧: This A4 expanding file folder measures 32.5x24.5cm and features 12 individual sections with colourful labels for easy sorting and quick document access, perfect for efficient daily paperwork management.

𝐏𝐫𝐞𝐦𝐢𝐮𝐦 𝐌𝐚𝐭𝐞𝐫𝐢𝐚𝐥: Made from high-quality plastic, this accordion file organiser is sturdy, tear-resistant and waterproof. It protects your important files from dirt, moisture and wear, ensuring long-term reliable storage.

𝐋𝐚𝐫𝐠𝐞 𝐂𝐚𝐩𝐚𝐜𝐢𝐭𝐲: This document organiser holds up to 360 sheets of A4 paper and other documents with ease. Its expandable design makes it an essential office tool for keeping paperwork neat, tidy, and categorised.

𝐒𝐞𝐜𝐮𝐫𝐞 𝐁𝐮𝐜𝐤𝐥𝐞 𝐂𝐥𝐨𝐬𝐮𝐫𝐞: Equipped with a convenient buckle lock for quick access and secure closure. This file organiser folder combines security with convenience, meeting all your document storage needs.

𝐖𝐢𝐝𝐞 𝐀𝐩𝐩𝐥𝐢𝐜𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧: This paperwork organiser is perfect for storing invoices, letters, receipts, contracts, and notes. Ideal for home, office, school, or travel, helping you stay organised wherever you go.
description: Keep your workspace neat and efficient with this A4 expanding file organiser. Measuring 32.5x24.5cm, it features 12 individual sections with colourful labels, allowing you to quickly sort, categorise and retrieve documents, perfect for improving productivity and organisation. Made from high quality waterproof plastic, this accordion folder is designed to withstand daily use while keeping your important papers clean, dry, and safe from damage. It easily holds up to 360 sheets of A4 paper, providing ample space for contracts, invoices, receipts, and notes. The secure buckle closure keeps contents protected and ensures easy access whenever needed. Ideal for home, office, school, or travel, this document organiser folder helps you manage paperwork effortlessly, a reliable companion for students, professionals, and anyone who values tidy, well-organised files. 𝐒𝐩𝐞𝐜𝐢𝐟𝐢𝐜𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐬: Product Name: 4Pcs A4 Poly Pockets Document Organiser Color: Blue, Green, Purple, Pink Material: Plastic Dimensions: 32.5×24.5cm Weight: 470g 𝐏𝐚𝐜𝐤𝐚𝐠𝐞 𝐂𝐨𝐧𝐭𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐬: 4 x Expandable File Organiser 4 x Labels
